families.claim_boundary: Reproduces committed raw-count statistics and a noiseless classical reference; does not submit QPU jobs or claim quantum advantage.

families.baseline: classical CHSH bound and Bell-state simulator reference
families.blocker: promote existing CHSH artefacts into a typed raw-data loader and reproducer
families.claim_boundary: Not exposed until raw counts, loader, tolerance bundle, and baseline are committed.
families.title: CHSH hardware sanity benchmark

families.blocker: define stable BKT raw-data schema, summary statistics, and reproducibility tolerances
families.claim_boundary: Not exposed until the dataset schema and finite-size tolerance policy are committed.

families.baseline: exact diagonalisation or tensor-network OTOC reference
families.blocker: identify canonical OTOC dataset and baseline implementation
